final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand exposure splash screen for a smartphone product launch.

Style/medium: needs high visual impact — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen layout optimized for 1080×1920 vertical format
Subject: must include the OPPO Find X9 product context
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium tech-launch atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that maximizes visual impact for brand exposure — exact color strategy is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO" and "Find X9" (brand/product naming)
Constraints: must preserve 1080×1920 aspect ratio, brand exposure priority
Avoid:
